title: Support - Tenant info persists after updating the app
scenario: Tenant information persists across mobile app updates after registration
steps: Register a mobile user on a tenant.
Verify tenant info is present in Poly Lens Menu > Support > App.
Install a new version of the mobile app.
Launch the new version of the mobile app.
Verify the tenant info is still present and matches the previous tenant info.
expected: Tenant information persists and matches the previous tenant info after updating the mobile app.
